imageAlt: Recreate your last invoice roadmap item preview image
title: Recreate your last invoice
summaryBody: As an estimated 29% of non-duplicate invoices (https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1eapTWNBgVusNDJ0klHSCrdbekVj167G_93sVWynsgg8/edit?slide=id.g37cf96d5ff8_0_1#slide=id.g37cf96d5ff8_0_1) have a matching predecessor, we have a significant opportunity to automate the highly repetitive task of creating an invoice by surfacing our invoice duplicator in the create invoice flow.
detailBody: As an estimated 29% of non-duplicate invoices (https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1eapTWNBgVusNDJ0klHSCrdbekVj167G_93sVWynsgg8/edit?slide=id.g37cf96d5ff8_0_1#slide=id.g37cf96d5ff8_0_1) have a matching predecessor, we have a significant opportunity to automate the highly repetitive task of creating an invoice by surfacing our invoice duplicator in the create invoice flow.
